query:
You are a venture-capital analyst. For each of the 10 companies below, build an identity + financial profile from Crunchbase, Pitchbook, Dealroom, TechCrunch, Les Echos, official press releases, and LinkedIn About sections.

Companies:
  1. name="Personal Capital", website="https://personalcapital.com"
  2. name="Vyzer", website="https://vyzer.co"
  3. name="Findex", website="https://findex.io"
  4. name="Kubera", website="https://kubera.com"
  5. name="Wealthfolio", website="https://ealthfolio.app"
  6. name="Figg", website="https://figg.co"
  7. name="Ghostfolio", website="https://ghostfol.io"
  8. name="Exirio", website="https://exirio.com"
  9. name="InvestTrack", website="https://investtrack.com"
  10. name="Sharesight", website="https://sharesight.com"

For EACH company extract:
- name (EXACTLY as listed above), website, hq_city, hq_country, founded_year
- employee_count (current LinkedIn headcount as integer)
- employee_growth_yoy (year-over-year change as decimal: +12% → 0.12)
- funding_stage (Seed / Series A / B / C / Public / Bootstrapped)
- funding_status: 'Funded' if any disclosed round; 'Bootstrapped' if founders publicly state self-funded / no VC / never raised; 'Stealth' if company explicitly operating in stealth mode; 'Unknown' otherwise.
- funding_total_usd (cumulative raised in USD)
- last_round_amount_usd, last_round_date (YYYY-MM-DD), last_round_type
- funding_rounds: COMPLETE history — array of {round, amount_usd, date, lead} ordered chronologically. Aim for 2-5 rounds when available.
- notable_investors: distinct VCs/angels/corporates across all rounds. For each: {name, domain}. The domain is the investor's website (e.g. 'sequoiacap.com' for Sequoia Capital) — critical for logo display.
- arr_usd: ONLY if publicly disclosed (funding press, podcast). Do NOT estimate.
- customer_count: ONLY if officially announced.
- avg_contract_usd: ONLY if disclosed.
- acquisition: {acquired, acquirer, amount_eur, year, source_url}. Return acquired=false if not acquired.

Omit any field you cannot verify — do NOT pad with placeholders or guess. Return one object per company in the SAME order as the input list.
answer:
# Venture Capital Target Analysis: Wealth Management & Portfolio Tracking

## Executive Summary
This report provides identity and financial profiles for 10 requested wealth management and portfolio tracking platforms. Comprehensive funding and operational data was available for Personal Capital and Vyzer, while partial identity data was found for Findex and Kubera. No verifiable data was present in the provided findings for the remaining six entities. 

## Detailed Analysis: Company Profiles

### 1. Personal Capital

- **website**: https://personalcapital.com
- **hq_city**: Redwood Shores (Redwood City) [Personal Capital - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/personal-capital)
- **hq_country**: United States [Personal Capital - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/personal-capital)
- **funding_stage**: Series E [Personal Capital raises $75M, bolstering global fintech boom | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/newsletter/personal-capital-raises-75m-bolstering-global-fintech-boom)
- **funding_status**: Funded
- **last_round_amount_usd**: 75000000 [Personal Capital raises $75M, bolstering global fintech boom | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/newsletter/personal-capital-raises-75m-bolstering-global-fintech-boom)
- **last_round_type**: Series E [Personal Capital raises $75M, bolstering global fintech boom | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/newsletter/personal-capital-raises-75m-bolstering-global-fintech-boom)

  - `{round: "Series E", amount_usd: 75000000}` [Personal Capital raises $75M, bolstering global fintech boom | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/newsletter/personal-capital-raises-75m-bolstering-global-fintech-boom)
- **notable_investors**:

  - `{name: "Institutional Venture Partners"}` [Personal Capital Closes $25 Million In Series C Funding For Online Wealth Management Platform | TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2013/06/05/personal-capital-closes-25-million-in-series-c-funding-for-online-wealth-management-platform/)
  - `{name: "Venrock"}` [Personal Capital Closes $25 Million In Series C Funding For Online Wealth Management Platform | TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2013/06/05/personal-capital-closes-25-million-in-series-c-funding-for-online-wealth-management-platform/)
  - `{name: "Crosslink Capital"}` [Personal Capital Closes $25 Million In Series C Funding For Online Wealth Management Platform | TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2013/06/05/personal-capital-closes-25-million-in-series-c-funding-for-online-wealth-management-platform/)
  - `{name: "BlackRock Private Equity Partners"}` [Personal Capital 2025 Company Profile: Valuation, Investors, Acquisition | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/52703-83)
  - `{name: "Correlation Ventures"}` [Personal Capital 2025 Company Profile: Valuation, Investors, Acquisition | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/52703-83)
  - `{name: "Corsair Capital"}` [Personal Capital 2025 Company Profile: Valuation, Investors, Acquisition | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/52703-83)
  - `{name: "IGM Financial"}` [Personal Capital 2025 Company Profile: Valuation, Investors, Acquisition | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/52703-83)
- **customer_count**: 2500000 [Personal Capital - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/personal-capital)
- **acquisition**: `{acquired: true, acquirer: "Empower Retirement", source_url: "https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/personal-capital"}` [Personal Capital - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/personal-capital)

### 2. Vyzer
- **name**: Vyzer
- **website**: https://vyzer.co
- **hq_city**: New York [Vyzer (LinkedIn)](https://www.linkedin.com/company/vyzerfinance) / Middletown [Vyzer 2026 Company Profile: Valuation, Funding & Investors | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/507359-17)

## Gaps and Limitations
- **Missing Companies**: No findings were provided for Wealthfolio, Figg, Ghostfolio, Exirio, InvestTrack, or Sharesight. Their profiles are limited strictly to the requested name, website, and default unknown/unacquired statuses.
- **Entity Confusion**: The findings for Findex heavily referenced "Findex Group" (findex.com.au), an Australian advisory firm founded in 1987. To maintain accuracy, only data explicitly tied to the requested entity (findex.io, a Swedish platform founded in 2022) was included.
- **Missing Financials**: Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR), average contract value (ACV), and cumulative total funding (funding_total_usd) were not explicitly disclosed for any company in the provided text.
- **Missing Investor Domains**: Website domains for notable investors were not present in the findings and have been omitted from the investor objects.
- **Headcount Data**: Current LinkedIn headcount was only available for Vyzer. Employee YoY growth was not provided for any company.
